title: SEALAPACK SAP016 Baking Sheets, Plastic, White
features: BAKE, WRAP, FREEZE: Sealapack Pre-cut sheets of baking paper are the perfect size to add your favourite biscuit mix to for tasty result. Ready to travel ? Wrap food to take lunch and other foods with you. Wrap a range of light easy to carry range of picnic essentials
NON-STICK, READY TO USE: These handy pre-cut sheets make baking so easy, they are also microwave safe so you can reheat any of your favourite treats for yourself, family or friends
PERFECT SIZE: Each sheet is 37 x 42cm, mix a batch of biscuits, or cookies, drop on the sheet and bake as per the recipe.

CLEAN BAKING: Release bakes from trays witout greasing. Remove a sheet from the box, add pizza, quiche, fresh or ready to bake dough or biscuits and cook. Eat and dispose of the baking paper or wrap for travel or storage
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: BOX OF 16 READY TO USE, PRE-CUT SHEETS 37 x 42cm
description: Product Description Sealapack Pre-cut sheets of baking paper are the perfect size to add your favourite biscuit mix to for tasty result. Ready to travel ? Wrap food to take lunch and other foods with you. Wrap a range of light easy to carry range of picnic essentials. These handy pre-cut sheets make baking so easy, they are also microwave safe so you can reheat any of your favourite treats for yourself, family or friends. Remove a sheet from the box, add pizza, quiche, fresh or ready to bake dough or biscuits and cook. Eat and dispose of the baking paper or wrap for travel or storage.
